personal.name: Clarissa Auliya Ghavira
personal.about: Fresh graduate in Information Systems with strong enthusiasm for continuous learning and professional growth in technology. Possesses keen interest in data engineering, data administration, and data analytics, transforming raw data into meaningful insights to support decision-making.

experiences.title: Mobile Market Trends Dashboard Analysis
desc: Analyzed smartphone market data across multiple brands, specifications, and pricing segments.
Cleaned and transformed raw datasets using data preprocessing techniques to ensure accuracy and consistency.
Developed interactive dashboards and KPI monitoring features to visualize mobile phone pricing trends and product distributions.
Conducted comparative analysis of processor types, storage capacity, screen size, and launch prices to identify market patterns.
Presented analytical findings through data visualization and business intelligence reporting to support strategic decision-making.

experiences.title: Research – Multivariate Weather Parameter Forecasting Using LSTM
desc: Processed and analyzed 17,000+ historical weather records (2017–2024) from Bogor Regency using Python.
Performed feature engineering and applied data normalization techniques for multivariate time series modeling.
Built and evaluated LSTM models to predict daily temperature, rainfall, humidity, and sunshine duration.
Assessed model performance using MAE and RMSE, with 4 out of 5 variables meeting climatological accuracy thresholds.

experiences.title: Research Assistant Intern
desc: Drafted UAT Scenario Document (Phase 1, Part 2) aligned with OJK's software testing framework.
Conducted benchmarking analysis of SINTESIS LMS platform to compare features and gain user experience insights.
Studied Digital Competency Dictionary and performed mini research on 10 core digital competencies for regulators in 2025.
Proposed updates to digital competency list and developed draft syllabus for training modules.

experiences.title: Capstone Project – Data Analytics
desc: Conducted EDA, data cleaning, and SQL querying using Spreadsheets and BigQuery on European bicycle sales dataset.
Identified significant profit decline in 2016 based on six-year sales trend analysis.
Developed data visualization dashboards in Google Looker Studio covering key metrics.
Generated data-driven insights and recommendations to address sales decline and cost optimization.

experiences.title: Scientific Research – Hotel Cancellation Analysis
desc: Analyzed 119,000 hotel booking demand records and identified high cancellation rate for City Hotels (65.5%).
Performed data cleaning in Google Colab, including fixing 488 missing values and handling outliers.
Built interactive dashboards in Looker Studio to present cancellation trend insights from 2015–2017.
Delivered data-driven operational recommendations to reduce cancellations.

achievements: Best Project in RevoU – Bike Sales Dataset

organizations.desc: Prepared all event equipment, ensured availability from start to end, coordinated with internal and external parties.
Responsible for communicating with external parties, ensuring event success and responding to inquiries.

certifications.name: Best Capstone Project – Bike Sales Dataset
